category_sources: Official Lerian docs describe Midaz CLI for interacting with Midaz platform services and APIs.
source_facts.description says it is a CLI for the mdz ledger open source.
docs_sources: Official Lerian docs provide a dedicated Midaz CLI page.
Official Lerian getting-started guide references the Midaz repository and ledger workflow.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/LerianStudio/midaz, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
